title: Diamond Compass
description: The Diamond Compasses datapack adds one thing. A compass made of diamonds that displays your coordinates while held. If in the offhand or mainhand, your coordinates display in the actionbar slot above your hotbar.
body:
Diamond Compasses

The datapack REQUIRES this Resource Pack.

The Diamond Compasses datapack adds one thing. A compass made of diamonds that displays your coordinates while held. If in the offhand or mainhand, your coordinates display in the actionbar slot above your hotbar. Super simple but quite a solid quality of life addition. To craft it, simply use the below recipe in a vanilla crafting table.



![Diamond Compass Recipe](https://sp-ao.shortpixel.ai/client/to_auto,q_glossy,ret_img,w_704/https://wasdbuildteam.website/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/diamond_compass.png)

NOTES TO YOUTUBERS: You may use this datapack in whatever video you like, free of charge. My only request: YOU MUST CREDIT ME for my work. Simply link to this page in your video’s description, pinned comment, or both AND verbally mention during the intro of your video that the pack can be downloaded using the link. “Download in the description” would suffice. To install, follow the instructions contained in the “instructions.txt” file included in the download. If you are still having issues installing or want help knowing how to do something with the pack, ask for help on our discord. Fully Multiplayer compatible!
